requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — SASO IEC 62368-1 under SALEEM (Dual Voltage Environment)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——SALEEM计划下的SASO IEC 62368-1（双电压环境）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——SALEEM計劃下的SASO IEC 62368-1（雙電壓環境）

summary.en: Saudi Arabia requires electrical safety conformity for audio/video, IT, and communications equipment (including wireless IoT devices with power supplies) through SASO's adoption of IEC 62368-1 as a Saudi Technical Regulation (SASO IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements). Electrical safety assessment is mandatory under the SALEEM conformity assessment program. A SALEEM Certificate of Conformity (CoC) covering electrical safety must be obtained before customs clearance. Saudi Arabia presents a unique dual-voltage environment: 127V/60Hz (used in some western regions, historically linked to US infrastructure) and 220V/50Hz (the predominant national standard aligned with most GCC countries) coexist. Products must either support both voltage ranges (100-240V universal SMPS) or carry clear voltage-specific labelling in Arabic and English indicating the supported voltage. Plug types A, B, and G (BS 1363) are in common use across Saudi Arabia. Products must be evaluated for safety against both voltage environments if intended for national distribution. The SALEEM mark must appear on the product.
summary.zh: 沙特阿拉伯通过SASO采纳IEC 62368-1作为沙特技术法规（SASO IEC 62368-1——音视频、信息及通信技术设备——第1部分：安全要求），要求音视频、IT及通信设备（包括带电源的无线物联网设备）符合电气安全要求。电气安全评定在SALEEM合格评定计划下为强制要求。产品须在海关清关前取得涵盖电气安全的SALEEM符合性证书（CoC）。沙特阿拉伯存在独特的双电压环境：127V/60Hz（部分西部地区使用，历史上与美式基础设施相关）和220V/50Hz（主要国家标准，与大多数GCC国家接轨）并存。产品须支持双电压范围（100-240V通用开关电源），或以阿拉伯语和英语标注清晰的电压专用说明，注明支持的电压。沙特阿拉伯普遍使用A型、B型和G型（BS 1363）插头。面向全国分销的产品须针对两种电压环境进行安全评定。SALEEM标志须标注于产品上。
summary.zht: 沙特阿拉伯通過SASO採納IEC 62368-1作為沙特技術法規（SASO IEC 62368-1——音視頻、信息及通信技術設備——第1部分：安全要求），要求音視頻、IT及通信設備（包括帶電源的無線物聯網設備）符合電氣安全要求。電氣安全評定在SALEEM合格評定計劃下為強制要求。產品須在海關清關前取得涵蓋電氣安全的SALEEM符合性證書（CoC）。沙特阿拉伯存在獨特的雙電壓環境：127V/60Hz（部分西部地區使用，歷史上與美式基礎設施相關）和220V/50Hz（主要國家標準，與大多數GCC國家接軌）並存。產品須支持雙電壓範圍（100-240V通用開關電源），或以阿拉伯語和英語標注清晰的電壓專用說明，注明支持的電壓。沙特阿拉伯普遍使用A型、B型和G型（BS 1363）插頭。面向全國分銷的產品須針對兩種電壓環境進行安全評定。SALEEM標誌須標注於產品上。

standards_or_laws: SASO IEC 62368-1 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Part 1: Safety requirements (Saudi adoption of IEC 62368-1, superseding SASO IEC 60950-1 for IT equipment)
SASO SALEEM Program — mandatory electrical safety conformity assessment and mark for electronic and electrical equipment imported into Saudi Arabia
Saudi Electricity Supply Regulations — dual voltage supply environment (127V/60Hz and 220V/50Hz) in Saudi Arabia

summary.en: China's mandatory electrical safety standard for audio/video and IT equipment is GB 4943.1 (Safety of information technology equipment — Part 1: General requirements), which aligns with IEC 60950-1 (the predecessor to IEC 62368-1). GB 4943.1 is enforced through the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) scheme administered by CNCA. A newer standard GB/T 42315 aligned with IEC 62368-1 has been issued but its mandatory timeline under CCC should be verified with CNCA. China operates on a single voltage standard: 220V/50Hz with Type A/I plugs; products for China do not need to address dual-voltage environments. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted by SASO as equivalent to SASO IEC 62368-1 conformity, and a SALEEM CoC is required separately for Saudi Arabia.
summary.zh: 中国音视频和IT设备的强制电气安全标准为GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全——第1部分：通用要求），与IEC 60950-1（IEC 62368-1的前身）接轨。GB 4943.1通过CNCA管理的CCC（中国强制认证）体系执行。与IEC 62368-1接轨的较新标准GB/T 42315已发布，但其在CCC下的强制实施时间表应向CNCA核实。中国采用单一电压标准：220V/50Hz，使用A型/I型插头；面向中国的产品无需考虑双电压环境。依据GB 4943.1的中国CCC认证不被SASO接受为SASO IEC 62368-1符合性的等同替代，沙特阿拉伯须单独取得SALEEM符合性证书。
summary.zht: 中國音視頻和IT設備的強制電氣安全標準為GB 4943.1（信息技術設備安全——第1部分：通用要求），與IEC 60950-1（IEC 62368-1的前身）接軌。GB 4943.1通過CNCA管理的CCC（中國強制認證）體系執行。與IEC 62368-1接軌的較新標準GB/T 42315已發布，但其在CCC下的強制實施時間表應向CNCA核實。中國採用單一電壓標準：220V/50Hz，使用A型/I型插頭；面向中國的產品無需考慮雙電壓環境。依據GB 4943.1的中國CCC認證不被SASO接受為SASO IEC 62368-1符合性的等同替代，沙特阿拉伯須單獨取得SALEEM符合性證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment — Part 1: General requirements (CCC mandatory, aligned with IEC 60950-1, predecessor to IEC 62368-1)
GB/T 42315 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 62368-1, CCC adoption timeline to be verified with CNCA)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted by SASO as equivalent to SASO IEC 62368-1 conformity. The product must be independently tested and certified to SASO IEC 62368-1 by an accredited laboratory, and a SALEEM CoC obtained before Saudi customs clearance. A critical additional gap is the dual-voltage environment in Saudi Arabia (127V/60Hz + 220V/50Hz): Chinese products designed only for 220V/50Hz may encounter 127V/60Hz supply in some Saudi regions. Products intended for national Saudi distribution should use a universal 100-240V/50-60Hz power supply, and voltage limitations must be clearly labelled in Arabic and English. Plug type compatibility (A, B, G) must also be addressed for the Saudi market, versus China's predominantly Type A/I environment.
gap.zh: 依据GB 4943.1的中国CCC电气安全认证不被SASO接受为SASO IEC 62368-1符合性的等同替代。产品须由认可实验室独立依据SASO IEC 62368-1进行测试和认证，并在沙特海关清关前取得SALEEM符合性证书。一个重要的额外差距是沙特阿拉伯的双电压环境（127V/60Hz + 220V/50Hz）：专为220V/50Hz设计的中国产品在沙特部分地区可能遇到127V/60Hz的电源。面向沙特全国分销的产品应采用通用100-240V/50-60Hz电源，且电压限制须以阿拉伯语和英语清晰标注。插头兼容性（A型、B型、G型）也须针对沙特市场处理，而中国主要使用A型/I型插头环境。
gap.zht: 依據GB 4943.1的中國CCC電氣安全認證不被SASO接受為SASO IEC 62368-1符合性的等同替代。產品須由認可實驗室獨立依據SASO IEC 62368-1進行測試和認證，並在沙特海關清關前取得SALEEM符合性證書。一個重要的額外差距是沙特阿拉伯的雙電壓環境（127V/60Hz + 220V/50Hz）：專為220V/50Hz設計的中國產品在沙特部分地區可能遇到127V/60Hz的電源。面向沙特全國分銷的產品應採用通用100-240V/50-60Hz電源，且電壓限制須以阿拉伯語和英語清晰標注。插頭兼容性（A型、B型、G型）也須針對沙特市場處理，而中國主要使用A型/I型插頭環境。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SASO IEC 62368-1 electrical safety conformity under SALEEM program required before import or sale in Saudi Arabia; SALEEM CoC and mark required; dual-voltage labelling mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification to GB 4943.1 required before sale in China for in-scope IT and AV equipment; single-voltage (220V/50Hz) product design standard

source.publisher: Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO) — SALEEM Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SASO IEC 62368-1 electrical safety conformity, delivered through a SALEEM Certificate of Conformity, is mandatory before wireless/IoT devices with power supplies may be imported or sold in Saudi Arabia. Chinese CCC/GB 4943.1 certification does not substitute. The dual-voltage environment (127V/60Hz + 220V/50Hz) in Saudi Arabia means products must use a universal power supply or carry clear Arabic-language voltage limitation labelling. Plug type compatibility with Saudi sockets (A, B, G) must be verified.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SASO IEC 62368-1电气安全合规（通过SALEEM符合性证书实现）是带电源的无线/物联网设备在进口或于沙特阿拉伯销售前的强制要求。中国CCC/GB 4943.1认证不可替代。沙特阿拉伯的双电压环境（127V/60Hz + 220V/50Hz）意味着产品须采用通用电源或标注清晰的阿拉伯语电压限制说明。须核实与沙特插座（A型、B型、G型）的插头兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SASO IEC 62368-1電氣安全合規（通過SALEEM符合性證書實現）是帶電源的無線/物聯網設備在進口或於沙特阿拉伯銷售前的強制要求。中國CCC/GB 4943.1認證不可替代。沙特阿拉伯的雙電壓環境（127V/60Hz + 220V/50Hz）意味著產品須採用通用電源或標注清晰的阿拉伯語電壓限制說明。須核實與沙特插座（A型、B型、G型）的插頭兼容性。
